zh.West Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy於大約1150年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內時，他的父親Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff23歲，母親Alfreka Abernethy12歲。他於大約1170年與Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1180年在他的家鄉享年32歲。

zh-hans.West Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy于大约1150年出生在苏格兰培爾阿波內时，他的父亲Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff23岁，母亲Alfreka Abernethy12岁。他于大约1170年与Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1180年在他的家乡享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Abernathy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: Orm
meanings: Found as a baptismal name. From Ora, name of Hersilia (who married Romulus) as a goddess.

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy was born about 1150, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff, was 23 and his mother, Alfreka Abernethy, was 12. He married Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway about 1170, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1180, in his hometown, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy est né environ 1150, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alfreka Abernethy, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway environ 1170, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1180, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy um 1150 in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff 23 und seine Mutter Alfreka Abernethy 12. Er hat um 1170 in Scotland Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1180 im Alter von 32 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy è nato il circa 1150 nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alfreka Abernethy, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway circa 1170, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1180, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.West Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathyが約1150年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで生まれた時，父Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuffは23歳，母Alfreka Abernethyは12歳であった。約1170年にスコットランドでLady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Gallowayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1180年に故郷で32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy(이)가 대략 1150년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alfreka Abernethy(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1170년 스컷랜드에서 Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1180년 그의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alfreka Abernethy, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway aproximadamente 1170, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1180, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy родился около 1150 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alfreka Abernethy, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway около 1170 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1180 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 32 лет.

sm.about 1150–about 1180: e tusa o le 1150–e tusa o le 1180

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy nació aproximadamente 1150, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alfreka Abernethy, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway aproximadamente 1170, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1180, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años.
